Off Calendar Mar-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Fred Naderi and wife/Nariman Naderi, Respondents/Plaintiffs
Bob Garg, Appellant/Defendant

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. The parties were sworn and testified. Respondent/Plaintiff introduced new documentary evidence to court. After both sides presented oral and documentary evidence to the court, the matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott A. Myles; Clerk: Leelay Chin; not reported (D. 525)
